_doc: Patterns for SIGSTOP / docker stop / kill scenarios used in resilience probes.

patterns.template:
# Freeze the {target} process (Windows: Stop-Process; POSIX: SIGSTOP).
        import platform
        if platform.system() == 'Windows':
            subprocess.run(['powershell', '-NoProfile', '-Command',
                            f'Stop-Process -Id {{ODOO_PID}} -Force'],
                           capture_output=True, timeout=10)
        else:
            subprocess.run(['kill', '-STOP', str(ODOO_PID)], timeout=5)
        page.wait_for_timeout(2000)

# docker stop {container}.
        subprocess.run(['docker', 'stop', '{container}'], capture_output=True, timeout=30)
        page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
